violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen by the bakery prep area was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

The hand-washing sink in the ware washing area was blocked by a sanitizer bucket and scrub pads in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Pieces of equipment were removed from the sink basin during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (service area slicers) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment was disassembled, cleaned, and sanitized during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

Carrots and celery were observed held at 95 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per observation, food items were double panned without water touching the bottom of pan holding foods items. Per PIC, food items had been in the hot hold unit for more than 2 hours and were voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the front prep unit in service area, as well as all 3 kitchen prep units on the cookline. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2026
An accumulation of ice buildup was observed in the walk-in freezer. Establishment is to run defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelving has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
An accumulation of ice build up was observed in the walk-in freezer. Establishment is to run defrost on unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

2 door lowboy was observed held at 56 degrees Fahrenheit. Milk was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. The dessert display case was observed at 48 DF. Food in unit was evaluated and was either voluntarily disposed of or moved to the walk-in cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. No TCS foods are to be stored in either unit until they are able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles were labeled at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and walk-in shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
An accumulation of ice build up was observed in the walk-in freezer. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

White Fish/Salmon was observed thawing in the walk in cooler in reduced oxygen packaging. Thawing Reduced Oxygen packed fish requires air to be reintroduced. Product was observed held at 35 Degrees Fahrenheit. Packages were opened. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (side of ice machine employee belongings were touching ice scoop) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Employee belongings were moved to designated area, ice scoop was washed rinsed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
The handle on the hot hold unit steam table located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
